name: ai-team-workflow
description: Codex-first AI Team workflow with project intake, global templates, Human Lead profile, workflow modes, compact context, production mode, task state, run evidence, repo map, command safety, release gates, and lightweight GitHub gates.

interface.longDescription: AI Team Workflow installs a global Codex standard and clean project template for Human Lead driven product development, project intake classification, workflow modes for light/standard/strict/parallel execution, compact context discipline for lower token waste, production mode routing, task cards, diff boundary checks, structured task state, compact run evidence, repo maps, natural-language routing, scale-aware quality gates, command safety policy, command risk classification, release gates, and lightweight GitHub PR/CI/security gates.
interface.shortDescription: Codex-first AI team workflow and project template.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up or use the AI Team Workflow for this project.
